name: Quadogmatika Beast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>凶導の聖獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クアドラグマ・ビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 monster in your GY or banishment; send to the GY, 1 monster from your Extra Deck or 1 "Dogmatika" monster from your Deck, with ATK greater than or equal to that target, and if you do, Special Summon that target. Until the end of your next turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck. You can only activate 1 "Quadogmatika Beast" per turn.
eff: Target 1 monster in your GY or banishment; send to the GY, 1 monster from your Extra Deck or 1 "Dogmatika" monster from your Deck, with ATK greater than or equal to that target, and if you do, Special Summon that target. Until the end of your next turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck. You can only activate 1 "Quadogmatika Beast" per turn.

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
